choices.label: 3 Years OnStar One (Standalone) Elevate your everyday drives with OnStar One. Have peace of mind with 24/7 access to Emergency Advisors and Stolen Vehicle Assistance. Plus
choices.description: stay connected and entertained with an in-vehicle Wi-Fi hotspot and on eligible vehicles get access to expanded in-vehicle apps, including internet browser, games and video streaming.
choices.source_detail_raw: 1. Requires (UE1) OnStar and a Retail order type. Not available on vehicles being shipped to Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, or Guam. OnStar plan, working electrical system, cell reception and GPS signal required. OnStar links to emergency services. Not all vehicles may transmit all crash data. Service coverage varies with conditions and location. Service availability, features and functionality vary by device and software version. Subject to user terms. See onstar.com for details and limitations.

choices.label: Teen Driver
choices.description: a configurable feature that lets you activate customizable vehicle settings associated with a key fob, to help encourage safe driving behavior. It can limit certain available vehicle features, and it prevents certain safety systems from being turned off. An in-vehicle report card gives you information on driving habits and helps you to continue to coach your new driver

standardEquipment.label: OnStar Basics (OnStar Fleet Basics for Fleet) Drive with confidence and convenience using core OnStar services
standardEquipment.description: featuring built-in voice assistance, real-time navigation, and access to audio streaming apps. With your vehicle mobile app, you can seamlessly manage your vehicle by sending commands and enjoy peace of mind knowing Automatic Crash Response can connect you to help if you’re in need.
standardEquipment.source_detail_raw: 1. Requires (UE1) OnStar. OnStar Basics is standard for 8 years; working electrical system, cell reception and GPS signal required. exclusiveGroups.notes: Grand Sport LS6 engine cover choices are mutually exclusive; duplicate generated option rows are preserved for a later cleanup pass.
Grand Sport wheel center cap choices are mutually exclusive within the Wheel Accessory section.
Grand Sport indoor car cover choices are mutually exclusive within the LPO Exterior section.
Rear Corvette script badge color choices are mutually exclusive within the LPO Exterior section.
Grand Sport suede frunk/trunk compartment liner choices are mutually exclusive within the LPO Interior section.
Grand Sport ground effects choices are mutually exclusive; inactive members stay in the source for reactivation without appearing in draft output.

rules.disabled_reason: Requires UE1 OnStar services capable.
rules.source_note: 1. Requires (UE1) OnStar. OnStar Basics is standard for 8 years; working electrical system, cell reception and GPS signal required. OnStar links to emergency services. Service coverage varies with conditions and location. Service availability, features and functionality vary by device and software version. Subject to user terms. See onstar.com for details and limitations. Removed with a ship-to of Guam, Puerto Rico or the Virgin Islands.

rows.option_name: Memory Driver and Passenger Convenience Package
Sueded Microfiber-Wrapped Upper Interior Trim Package

rows.detail_raw: 1. Included and only available with (J57) carbon ceramic brakes.
1. Requires (J57) carbon ceramic brakes.
1. To be used exclusively to override exterior, interior and seat belt color combinations. SOLD orders only. Color Combination Override is available at an additional charge.

rows.option_name: Custom Interior Trim and Seat Combination
rows.detail_raw: 1. SOLD orders only. Requires (HMO/HVV) Jet Black/Sky Cool Gray, (HZB/HVT) Sky Cool Gray/Jet Black, (HU0/HXO) Jet Black/Adrenaline Red, (HUU/HZP) Adrenaline Red/Jet Black interiors. See Custom Interior Trim and Seat Combinations color and trim chart.
1. Available on SOLD orders only. (CFX) Personalized plaque is already included in (R8C) Corvette Museum Delivery.
1. This option is subject to restrictions and approval. NOT AVAILABLE on all VINs. Available on SOLD orders only.
1. Must also add Ship To BAC 184590 (Dealer code 31-728). Available on SOLD orders only. Not available with LPO wheels.

1. Requires (H1Y/HTM/HTP) Jet Black interior.
2. Requires (HTE/HTT/HUB/HUC) Jet Black interior.

1. Requires (H1Y/HTM/HTP) Jet Black interior.
2. Requires (HTE/HTT/HUB/HUC) Jet Black interior.

1. Requires (H1Y/HTM/HTP) Jet Black interior.
2. Requires (HTE/HTT/HUB/HUC) Jet Black interior or (HU0/HXO) Adrenaline Red/Jet Black interior.

1. Includes (D3V) engine lighting. Requires (B6P) on Coupe
2. Requires (ZZ3) Convertible Engine Appearance Package.
1. Includes (D3V) engine lighting. This option is without (B6P)
1. Included and only available with (ZZ3) Convertible Engine Appearance Package.

1. Requires (B6P) on Coupe. Includes (D3V) engine lighting.
2. Requires (ZZ3) Convertible Engine Appearance Package.

1. Requires (B6P) on Coupe. Includes (D3V) engine lighting.

1. Includes (D3V) engine lighting. This option is without (B6P)

1. Included with (B6P/ZZ3) Engine Appearance Package.
1. Requires (WUB) quad center exit exhaust.
1. Included with (FEY) Z52 Track Performance Package.

1. Rockers and splitters are not Carbon Flash when (CFV) visible carbon fiber ground effects is also ordered.

rows.option_name: Carbon Flash Grand Sport Heritage Center Stripe
rows.detail_raw:
1. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics.
2. Requires (Z15) Grand Sport Heritage Graphics. Note: When (D84) Carbon Flash painted nacelles and roof is ordered (required or selected) roof will not include the stripe.

rows.option_name: Blade Silver Grand Sport Heritage Center Stripe
rows.detail_raw:
